email_templates.subject: Your Plumbing Maintenance Reminder
email_templates.content:
Hi [NAME],

It's been 6 months since your last plumbing service. Here's a quick checklist to prevent costly emergencies:

• Check faucets for leaks
• Test water pressure
• Inspect toilet for running water
• Clear drain strainers

Need professional maintenance? We offer:
✓ Full system inspection - $89
✓ Preventive maintenance plans
✓ Emergency repair guarantee

Schedule today: [PHONE]

Best regards,
[BUSINESS_NAME]
